stories.headline: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
stories.summary: Navy Secretary John Phelan is departing his position immediately following actions by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, marking a significant leadership change at the Pentagon during a period of heightened tensions in the Middle East. The departure occurs as the US Navy faces operational demands related to maintaining freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing confrontations with Iran.

stories.headline: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
stories.summary: An Israeli air strike in south Lebanon kills journalist Amal Khalil, whom Lebanese officials say was deliberately targeted rather than hit incidentally. The incident occurs amid escalating cross-border tensions and separate strikes that killed five people in Gaza, including three children.

stories.headline: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
stories.summary: Two passenger trains collided head-on near Copenhagen, resulting in five people being treated for critical injuries. Emergency services responded to the incident, which disrupted rail services in the region as authorities investigate the cause of the collision.

stories.headline: EU set to sign off €90bn loan for Ukraine and fresh Russia sanctions – Europe live
stories.summary: The European Union is finalizing a €90 billion loan to Ukraine while preparing new sanctions against Russia, addressing Ukraine's urgent financing needs as military support from other sources shifts. Russia simultaneously moves to disrupt energy supplies to Europe and revive oil flows to Hungary and Slovakia, escalating economic pressure across the continent.

stories.headline: Pope Leo visits prison in Equatorial Guinea
stories.summary: Pope Francis visits a prison in Equatorial Guinea as part of his Africa tour, engaging directly with inmates and addressing systemic challenges in the country. His visit emphasizes themes of justice and economic inequality, reflecting broader messages he has delivered throughout the trip about accountability and human dignity.

stories.headline: Senate Republicans bypass Democrats to advance $70bn ICE and border patrol plan in ‘vote-a-rama’– US politics live
stories.summary: Senate Republicans used the budget reconciliation process to advance a $70 billion funding plan for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol without Democratic support. The maneuver allows Republicans to pass the measure with a simple majority, sidestepping the typical requirement for bipartisan agreement on spending legislation.

stories.headline: Girl, 14, found in singer D4vd's car died of 'multiple injuries'
stories.summary: An autopsy reveals that 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez, found in singer D4vd's vehicle, died from multiple penetrating wounds. Authorities have connected the teenager's death to the musician, who faces charges in the case.

stories.headline: India news: Tamil Nadu, West Bengal cast votes
stories.summary: Voters in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal participate in state assembly elections that test the strength of Prime Minister Modi's political alliance. These two populous states represent distinct regional interests and will help determine the balance of power in India's parliament through their representation in future legislative sessions.

stories.headline: Prince Harry makes surprise visit to Ukraine
stories.summary: Prince Harry travels to Kyiv in an unannounced visit, marking a high-profile show of solidarity with Ukraine during its ongoing conflict with Russia. The visit underscores continued international attention to the war and demonstrates support from prominent figures outside government circles.

stories.headline: 'I can't stop using it' - under-16s have their say on possible social media ban
stories.summary: Turkey's parliament has passed legislation to restrict social media access for children under 15, joining other countries considering age-based limits on platform use. Young people responding to the debate acknowledge their difficulty in reducing screen time, highlighting the addictive design features that platforms use to retain users.
